title: Republic Act No. 10140
text:
Republic of the Philippines

Congress of the Philippines

Metro Manila

Fourteenth Congress

Third Regular Session

Begun and held in Metro Manila, on Monday, the twenty-seventh day of July, two thousand nine.

[REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10140]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE BACOLOD — MADALUM HIGHWAY INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The road which starts from the Iligan-Aurora National Highway at Bacolod and traverses Munai in the Province of Lanao del Norte and Marawi-Cotabato National Highway at Madalum in the Province of Lanao del Sur is hereby converted into a national road.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE President of the Senate

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 2, 2008 and February 2, 2010, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JUN 03 2010

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO President of the Philippines

Source: CDAsia
